rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §8.156, which addresses school district participation in mental health professional training.
quote: This subchapter does not require a school district to participate in training provided by a non-physician mental health professional or otherwise use the professional as a resource.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to an unrelated subject area.
